generated_exposure.exposure_text: 🚨 Just last month in our own city, coordinated groups tried to disrupt critical infrastructure. Local law enforcement was caught unprepared because they didn't have the tools to track these organized threats. We can't afford to wait until it's too late. Expanding domestic security powers isn't about restricting freedoms - it's about giving our protectors the tools they need to keep us safe from these growing dangers. #CommunitySafetyFirst #SecurityForAll
